chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-142 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 431/24 2.For orders on office objections 3.For orders on CMA 432/24 4.For hearing of main case 07-03-2025 None present for the Petitioner. **** None present for the petitioner; no intimation is received. However, on perusal of petition, it reflects that same has been filed against harassment, for which the petitioner has already approached the Justice of Peace and obtained favourable order. Under the circumstances, no writ can be issued. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed along with listed application(s). JUDGE Ahmad
